## Description

Provide a clear description of the changes in this pull request.

- What problem does this solve?
- What feature does this add?
- Why is this change important?

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🔧 Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ✅ Test improvements
- [ ] 🎨 Code style improvements (formatting, etc.)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements

## Testing

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Added new tests for the changes (if applicable)
- [ ] All existing tests still pass

**Test Command**:
```bash
npm test
```

**Test Results**:
- All tests passed? (Yes/No)
- Any new tests added? (Yes/No)

## Changes to Documentation

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] New examples added
- [ ] API documentation updated (JSDoc comments)
- [ ] No documentation changes needed

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project
- [ ] I have added tests to cover my changes
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] I have checked for and avoided any breaking changes (or marked above)
- [ ] I have added a clear description in the PR title

## Screenshots / Examples

If applicable, add screenshots, code snippets, or example output to help reviewers understand the changes.

**Before**:
```javascript
// Old behavior
```

**After**:
```javascript
// New behavior
```

## Related Issues

Closes #ISSUE_NUMBER
Related to #ISSUE_NUMBER

## Additional Notes

Anything else reviewers should know? Any special considerations for testing or deployment?

---

**Thank you for your contribution!** 🎉
